name: workflow-design-bible
description: The Loop Design Bible: design self-running agent LOOPS, not just prompts, using the eight-part architecture (Trigger, Context Injection, Agent Role, Tools, Verification, State, Retry, Escalation). Also a constitution generator that interviews you and scaffolds a complete constitution + documentation system (a lean root CLAUDE.md, a brand configuration.json, and a documentation/ skeleton) around a CEO-orchestrated architecture: main agent -> sub-agents -> skills -> CLI/MCP.
